prose:
**Aniline frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density fitting RIJK) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single-point energy at the provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz` (no geometry optimization at DFT). SCF converged in 9 cycles. HOMO energy = –5.553772 eV; LUMO energy = –0.2489544 eV; HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.3048177 eV. No warnings reported.

Reproducibility: command run:
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier \
  --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard \
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz \
  --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpb4eitu3_/live.json
```
Result JSON written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpb4eitu3_/live.json`. The engine's stdout/stderr was streamed live to a `frontier_<timestamp>.out` log file in the current working directory for monitoring.
